articles.title: Temitope Oriola: Bail reform a good move, but are we ready for the cost?
articles.description: The Bail and Sentencing Reform Act (Bill C-14) is now law. In effect from mid-July 2026, the explicit objective is ‘stricter bail laws and tougher sentencing laws’. articles.title: Fonderie Horne accounts for 87% of arsenic emissions in Quebec

articles.title: Appeal court doubles sentence for 71-year-old who raped Edmonton woman in early 80s
articles.description: Alberta’s top court has more than doubled the sentence given to an Ontario man who raped an Edmonton woman in a parkade 45 years ago.
